ChatGPT-specific official results were talks, newsletters, admissions brochures, or research/news pages, not policy.
robots.txt on the main domain pointed to /sitemap.xml; the selected handbook PDF was publicly fetchable on an official IITH subdomain.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found no university-wide generative-AI policy page. The usable official policy evidence is the public IITH Academic Handbook PDF, which supports narrow academic-integrity and plagiarism claims only.

artifacts.claimText: IIT Hyderabad's academic handbook expects students to do academic work with integrity and to properly acknowledge material included from other sources.

artifacts.title: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IITH) staged source review
artifacts.summary: The staged crawl found official IITH academic-integrity evidence in the Academic Handbook PDF, including proper acknowledgement expectations and plagiarism penalties. Official GenAI and ChatGPT search results were research, event, department, or newsletter pages and were rejected for policy use.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No university-wide generative-AI or ChatGPT policy source was found in the official-source discovery pass.
Claims are limited to the official academic handbook language and do not infer rules for AI tool use beyond the cited academic-integrity text.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
